title: quercus conduplicans
intro: Quercus conduplicans, also known as the folded oak, is a species of tree in the family Fagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus conduplicans include reducing fever, treating gastrointestinal issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Quercus conduplicans can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for consumption, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
